metadata.description: Marketplace for the fable-loop autonomous agent loop plugin.

plugins.name: fable-loop
plugins.description: A general-purpose autonomous agent loop: architect/builder role separation, fail-investigate-verify-distill iteration, verifier sub-agent gating, and short-map external memory. v0.2 adds contractual distrust-by-default, externalized decision logs, boundary-first scoping, reversibility, and a broadened definition of done.
